title: Two accused of Raywin Brits' murder appear in Thembalethu
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The two men accused...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The two men accused of killing the 18-year-old Asla Park resident, Raywin Brits, in 2022, appeared in the Thembalethu Regional Court in George on 29 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The two men accused of killing the 18-year-old Asla Park resident, Raywin Brits, in 2022, appeared in the Thembalethu Regional Court in George on 29 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Brits was found dead near the Asla Park Community Hall on 12 November 2022. He had been hit on the back of the head with a blunt object. Stalin Michaels (21) and Luwayn Kanemeyer (35) were arrested shortly afterwards."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The matter was postponed to 22 October.","html":"The matter was postponed to 22 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Tweede tragedie tref Aslapark-gesin","Woman charged in Hagan Brits murder appears in court"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Two accused of Raywin Brits' murder appear in Thembalethu
